28 SFT_VER SFT_VER Software Version CHAR 5 This field conatins the version number of the vendor software being used by the facility or the facility's agent to automate the assessment submission process.
29 T3STCLRG T3STATE_CALC_RUG State Case Mix Group CHAR 5 Multistate supplement: state (Medicaid) case mix group.
30 STATE_ID STATE_ID State ID CHAR 2 The two-digit state abbreviation. This may also be the two-character CMS
